scenes.narration: Merit letters go out soon. You still haven't checked who's below minimum — or whether a manager earns less than their team. ShiftWorks HR ends that weekly fire drill.
Just export from Workday or your payroll system and drop the file in. We map your columns automatically. No setup project. No IT ticket.
About a minute later, you get the same results view your comp team sees every day — cycle readiness, priority counts, and what to fix before you lock merit.
Drill into below-minimum employees with the real issue table — name, department, salary, range, and dollar gap — exactly like the live product.
Pay equity is built in. Gender and race median gaps by group, with level-by-level breakdowns when you need to answer DEI questions with data.
Location pay works the same way. Median pay by office, geographic gaps, and same-level comparisons across cities — straight from your HRIS export.
Need to brief leadership? One export gives you a PDF with risk level, budget exposure, and the findings they'll actually ask about.
Try it with your own roster at shiftworkshr.com. Free to start — no credit card.
